companies.name: Anthropic
companies.reason: Anthropic is an AI research firm that has recently seen its valuation rocket to $965 billion, positioning it as a major player and even surpassing OpenAI in the AI showdown, according to reports.

companies.name: Wipro Limited
companies.reason: Wipro's stock is up 4% following news of its expanded partnership aimed at scaling AI adoption. This indicates positive market reaction to its strategic moves in the artificial intelligence sector.

companies.name: Glean
companies.reason: Glean, an enterprise AI startup, is trending after successfully raising $150 million in Series F funding, which boosted its valuation to $7.2 billion. The company's focus on "AI budget-cutting" solutions is a major selling point contributing to its increased top line.
